headline: Diamond Hill Capital Select Strategy Picked Aon plc (AON) Downplays AI Disruption Concerns
summary: Diamond Hill Capital, a First Eagle Investment Management company, issued its Q1 2026 investor letter for its “Select Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy declined 0.52% (net of fees), surpassing the Russell 3000 Index’s 3.96%. The performance was driven by stock selection and overweight exposure in industrials, along with an underweight in […]
